en.title: Lesson 2 - Install Git
en.subtitle: Learn how to install Git on Windows, Linux, and Mac

sections.title: Why Install Git
points: Git must be installed before using version control
It allows developers to track code changes
Git provides command line tools for repository management
Most DevOps workflows require Git installed locally

sections.title: Install Git on Windows
points: Run installer and keep default settings
sections.note: Always download Git from the official website to avoid security risks.

sections.title: Install Git on Linux
points: Most Linux distributions support Git via package manager
CentOS and RedHat use yum or dnf

sections.title: Install Git on Mac
points: Mac users can install Git using Homebrew
Alternatively install Xcode command line tools

sections.title: Verify Git Installation
points: After installation verify Git is working
sections.note: If Git version appears, installation was successful.

sections.title: Real World Example
sections.note: Every developer verifies Git installation before starting a project.

ta.title: பாடம் 2 - Git நிறுவல்
ta.subtitle: Windows, Linux மற்றும் Mac இல் Git நிறுவுவது

sections.title: Git ஏன் நிறுவ வேண்டும்
sections.note: Git இல்லாமல் project version control செய்ய முடியாது.
